_note: the ARC face: narrative roles + elastic arcs + tiers. Seed vocabulary = the deck-evidenced set; the glyphgraph grows its own event-kinds over the same machinery (roles are DATA).

open.does: sets the feeling before any argument — brand, one line, almost no words

argue.does: states the problem or claim with one big visual beside the words

show.does: shows the thing itself — media-heavy, before/after, the work in motion

prove.does: evidence in numbers and third parties — stat bands, checklists, partner marks

plan.does: time and intention — the route forward
plan.affinity_note: the split-bleed here carries the timeline cascade (deck s12)

people.does: the humans and the terms — bios, commitments, figures

close.does: returns to the feeling — contact, the mark, warmth

pitch.evidence: the deck at n=16: open s1 · argue s2–3 · show s4–8 · prove s9–11 · plan s12 · people s13–15 · close s16

tiers._status: PREDICTED FROM PRINCIPLE (2026-06-10) — Tim holds a multi-count set of the same story made at different times; these fusion maps are FALSIFIABLE PREDICTIONS to test at ingestion. Where his evidence disagrees, the evidence wins.

tagline.is: the root line alone — the tree at depth zero

one-pager.is: every role on one page — the page becomes a stack whose bands are the roles

strategies.fuse: every role on one page (the original prediction — still valid for dense leave-behinds)
strategies.extract: the strongest fragment stands alone (Tim's practice: the current→solution duo + title + foot)

teaser.is: the classic problem / solution / ask — fusion produces it naturally

short.is: roles mostly separate; adjacent roles may still share a page

full.is: no fusion — every role runs at its own length (the source deck, n=16)

tiers._verdict: CORPUS VERDICT (2026-06-12): the real one-pager (vi-onepager) EXTRACTS the strongest fragment — the current→solution duo standing alone — rather than fusing all roles. TWO STRATEGIES now: FUSE (roles as bands) and EXTRACT (one node, whole); extract wins when a single fragment materializes the root claim. Fusion is separately CONFIRMED across revisions (digitisation trio: full page in 15p, fused third in 17p; value tetrad: plates 2024 → chips 2025).

content_role_map._note: what kind of content unit wants which role — the step that turns 'format a deck' into 'compose an argument'
